MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON OCT-17-2019 IN 206, PLAINTIFF LATEESHI DIXON'S MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM WAIVER OF JURY TRIAL WAS HEARD. TE'REISHA GRAVES, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT GRANTED THE MOTION. THE CURRENT TRIAL DATE OF 06/29/20 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM REMAINS AND WILL BE CONVERTED TO A JURY TRIAL. PLAINTIFF TO POST JURY FEES BY 2:00PM IN PERSON OR 4:00PM ONLINE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206/GLW)
